task_description: Execute 7-step research for WI-002 daemon redesign investigation
anomaly: task tool returned empty task_result despite all 7 research files + work_log successfully written to disk; counts as additional tool crack evidence
key_discoveries_beyond_plan: WAL multi-instance mess: Daemon.ts L82 builds separate WAL for HTTPServer != StateManager's WAL (same path, different counters)
StateManager double-instantiation: Daemon.ts L52 global + ProjectManager.ts L63 per-project — 2+ independent instances

RecoverySubsystem.checkAndRepair root cause precision: Daemon.ts L54 does not inject wal/stateManager → falls back to rebuildFromEvents L305 which always returns workItems:[] → then overwriteState.json — this is the precise root cause of WI-001 ghost-in-memory bug
Property 21 dangling contract: reconnectOldSessions code path L443-L523 has no real producer of session.activated events
recommendation: A+D Hybrid in 4 phases (Phase 0: A quick fix hours / Phase 1: WAL+StateManager singleton days / Phase 2: SessionRegistry WAL-ification weeks / Phase 3: Property 21 rewrite days)
